Date: {{date}}

This is to certify that {{name}} has completed the recorded association with {{company_name}} in the role of {{role}} under the {{department}} department. This certificate is issued from the company record maintained under reference number {{reference_id}} and may be used for academic, employment, professional, contractual, or background verification purposes, subject to official verification.

The company record identifies the association as {{role_context}}. {{timeline_statement}} {{status_statement}} This certificate confirms completion or recorded participation based on the information available in the HRFLOW system and supporting records maintained by the company.

Reference ID{{reference_id}}
Joining Date{{joining_date}}
Date Of Exit{{exit_date}}
Engagement Duration{{duration}}
Reporting Manager{{manager}}
Lifecycle Status{{status}}
BGV Contact{{bgv_email}}
Verification URL{{verify_url}}

Completion Confirmation

During the recorded engagement, {{name}} participated in assigned work, learning, operational, project, documentation, coordination, support, implementation, review, reporting, or research activities relevant to {{role}}. The association was supervised by {{manager}} and aligned with the expectations of the {{department}} department.

The work scope may have included role-specific learning, practical exposure, communication with team members, task ownership, preparation of reports or deliverables, participation in reviews, responsible handling of internal information, and compliance with company instructions. The certificate records the company-maintained status of the association and does not replace independent verification where such verification is required.

Professional Conduct And Participation

Based on available records, {{name}} was expected to maintain professional discipline, attendance standards, communication quality, confidentiality, respect for timelines, and responsible handling of company information. The individual was expected to follow instructions from {{manager}} and authorized company representatives while contributing to the role requirements applicable during the recorded period.

  • Maintained role alignment with {{role}} and departmental expectations of {{department}}.
  • Participated in assigned activities, reviews, documentation, coordination, and reporting as required.
  • Handled company information, credentials, files, communication, and project materials according to confidentiality expectations.
  • Observed professional conduct standards, workplace discipline, and responsible use of company systems.
  • Completed or participated in the engagement lifecycle recorded under reference {{reference_id}}.

Digital Verification And Record Integrity

{{digital_record_statement}} {{verification_statement}} The QR code, barcode, reference number, verification link, and BGV email are part of the official verification controls. A verifier should confirm the complete record instead of relying on screenshots, edited copies, cropped extracts, or unofficial summaries.

Limitations And Continuing Obligations

This certificate confirms the recorded completion or participation status available to the company as of {{date}}. It does not certify future employment, compensation, entitlement, visa eligibility, regulatory qualification, or any fact not expressly stated in the company record. Confidentiality, data protection, intellectual property, and responsible-use obligations continue after completion wherever applicable.

The authenticity of this certificate can be verified by scanning the QR code printed on this document, using {{verify_url}}, or quoting reference number {{reference_id}} to {{bgv_email}}.

We appreciate {{name}}'s association with {{company_name}} and wish continued success in future academic, professional, and career pursuits.
